subject: System login issue
body:
Hello, several users in our company are unable to log in to the system today, getting an account locked message. Please handle this as soon as possible.

Zhang San
Stellar Tech

subject: Urgent: Data import failure
body:
Hello, we tried to import March sales data but the system keeps showing an error: field format mismatch. We have tried reformatting according to the template but the error persists. Please assist urgently.

Wang Wu
Evergreen Trading

subject: Report export anomaly
body:
The quarterly report exported from your system shows all Q1 data as 0, which is clearly incorrect. Please check the report generation functionality.

Liu Qi
Grand Logistics

subject: Mobile app unusable
body:
Our sales team needs the mobile app while traveling, but after a recent update the app crashes immediately, severely impacting business operations.

Chen Ba
Vision Consulting

subject: API call issue
body:
Our system integration API has been returning a large number of timeout errors since yesterday, with an error rate of approximately 40%. Please handle this urgently.

Zhao Jiu
Smart Link Data
